user_prompt: My Valkyrie gunship is ready for synchronization
prayer:
Approach the Valkyrie gunship with reverence, intoning the Canticle of Alignment upon its auspex arrays.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the Valkyrie gunship, beseeching synchronization with the Omnissiah's divine calculus.
Anoint the thruster vanes and synchronization nodes with sacred unguents, purging discordant resonances.
Initiate the synchronization rite, monitoring harmonics as the Valkyrie gunship achieves blessed unity.
Verify the Machine Spirit's harmonious accord through noospheric diagnostics.

user_prompt: Sanctify the utility mechadendrite during reset
prayer:
Kneel before the utility mechadendrite, whispering the Litany of Nullification to awaken its core.
Sanctify the utility mechadendrite's manipular coils with lustral oils during the reset invocation.
Command the reset sequence, exorcising errant data-daemons from its sacred processors.
Beseech the Omnissiah to restore purity to the utility mechadendrite as its Machine Spirit reboots.
Test the appendage's responsiveness with binary catechisms of function.

user_prompt: The phosphor blaster awaits a synchronization
prayer:

Invoke synchronization upon the phosphor blaster's ignition servos, aligning them to the Omnissiah's will.
Anoint the barrel assemblies of the phosphor blaster with blessed lubricants, banishing misfires.
Engage the synchronization protocols, intoning praises as the Machine Spirit ignites in perfect chorus.
Confirm targeting coherence through auspex-verified bursts of holy light.

Consecrate the surgical servitor's vibro-scalpels and neural clamps with incense of purity.
Invoke the Omnissiah's mercy for the consecration, binding its Machine Spirit to servile precision.
Anoint the occulobe implants of the surgical servitor, ensuring unerring incision rites.
Test the consecration with diagnostic vivisections upon null-test subjects.

Extract sanctified data-vaults, sealing them with seals of final benediction.
